title: Farmer's Daughter Fibers
summary: Website updates and custom tools improving customer experience, paired with SEO and PPC work to grow visibility and sales.
quote: The Demski Group has done an outstanding job updating our website and implementing custom tools that have greatly improved our customer experience. Their expertise in SEO and PPC has also significantly increased our online visibility and sales.
results: SEO and PPC work significantly increased online visibility.
Online sales grew alongside improved visibility and customer experience.
